# This file was generated by muscomp. DO NOT EDIT.

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.25)
set(CMAKE_AUTOMOC ON)

qt_add_executable(muscovite_harbor_widgets_app
    main.cpp
    main_window.hpp
    main_window.cpp
    session_manager.hpp
    session_manager.cpp
    login_dialog.hpp
    login_dialog.cpp
)

target_link_libraries(muscovite_harbor_widgets_app PRIVATE
    Qt6::Core
    Qt6::Gui
    Qt6::Widgets
    vessel_traffic-qt-widgets
    cargo_operations-qt-widgets
    passenger_terminal-qt-widgets
    intermodal_transfer-qt-widgets
    cargo_decomposition-qt-widgets
    harbour_control-qt-widgets
)
